name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BraceForImpactHelper.GsFricScale1
summary: Glancing spin help. Friction scale applied when to the side of the car.  e.g. make the character spin more by upping the friction against the car.
remarks:
Default value = 8.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 10.0f.
